# Transcript
QEOI
TADE EMISQWQH EPI DIOTIMOY ARCONTOS MOYNICIWNOS TETR***
ISTAMENOYELEYSINI EN TWI IERWI PARA TO NOTION TEICOS TO TOY
IEROY AR*AMENON APO TOY E*TRWMENOY O TOIS KIOSIN ESTRWTAI
TOIS PROSQIOISTA***N ORYXAI PLATOS OKTW PODWN MHKOS TRIA
KONTA PODWNBAQO******TOY STERIFOY KAI EKFORHSANTA THN G
HN EXW TOY IEROY EI********ON TO EPI TOY STADIOY TIQENAI TO
YS LIQOYS THS MALAKHS PETR****OSEPITEMNONTA OY AN HI PETR
A SYNTIQENTA TOYS ARMOYS STERIFOYS ARMOTTONTAS PANTACHI
**KOS TETRAPODAS PLATOS DIPODAS PACOS TRIHMIPODIOYSKAI
EPERGAZESQAI KATA TON STOICON EKASTON DIANEKH EPI DE TOYT
WN TIQENAI KATALHPTHRAS MHKOS TETRAPODASPLATOS PENQHMI
PODIOYSPACOS PENTEPALASTOS TWN EK THS STOAS KAQAIROYMEN
WN EXERGASAMENOORQOYS KAI EYGWNIOYS PANTACHI KAI TOYS A
*MOYS POIHSANTA EPI HMIPODION SYNTIQENAI AQRAYSTOYS KAI
***OTTONTAS PANTACHI KAI EPERGASAMENON ORQA KAI EYTENH
*****THS ANTIMACOS NEOKLEIDOY KHFISIEYS :*III:HHHH
**********KOSTRATOS ARESIOY PEIRAIEYS STHSAI TOYS KI
**********QINOYS TOYS NYN YPOKEIMENOYS YPO THI STOAIKATA T
**************SAMENOYS SFONDYLON EKASTWI TWI KIONI TON E
*****************YTHN ERGASIAN TWI KIONI :DPI: MIS
*****************YHTHS EPIK
********
# Lines: x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 x4 y4
